title: Would Misatos teasing work on you
display_title: Would Misatos teasing work on you
wikitext:
[]: Would Misato's teasing work on you?             Quote Post by Kyle » Sun May 27, 2007 9:32 pm Would it?Would it get to you?Would it make you angry?Or would you submit only to be denied when you went all "lupin trough the window"? Also you have to post drunk Misato(DM)and sober Misato(SM)scenarios. I'd play along.Misato does it just to see reactions.I wonder if I played along how far would it go until she lost her fun in it. BTW-This is what id do for both DM and SM.You can have the same reaction for both if you want.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 27, 2007 9:43 pm She is not my type, and I would let her know right away, but say that she's more than welcomed to join me for drinks.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 27, 2007 9:55 pm Ornette wrote: She is not my type, and I would let her know right away,

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 27, 2007 10:04 pm If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 27, 2007 10:08 pm NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 27, 2007 10:11 pm NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sun May 27, 2007 10:15 pm NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 27, 2007 10:16 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 27, 2007 10:19 pm Executor wrote: Apparently, ONE-NIGHT STANDS ARE FUN!! Until you get sued for child support. Then you're fucked.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sun May 27, 2007 10:20 pm Executor wrote: Eva Yojimbo wrote: NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 27, 2007 10:24 pm Kyle wrote: Executor wrote: Eva Yojimbo wrote: NAveryW wrote: If I had a particular "type", I can assure you it wouldn't be "alcoholic slut". ...Does that mean I'm gay?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 27, 2007 10:35 pm Executor wrote: Or you're too piss-drunk to wrap it. Or the rubber breaks, or, if you have a beaner(I'm a half), holes are then poked into said condum. Yep, you're still fucked. both ways.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 27, 2007 10:47 pm Ornette wrote: I've also mentioned this in another thread. I'd never want to meet any real life equivalents of any of the Eva characters, although Misato wouldn't be the worst of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 27, 2007 10:49 pm Ornette wrote: Executor wrote: Or you're too piss-drunk to wrap it. Or the rubber breaks, or, if you have a beaner(I'm a half), holes are then poked into said condum. Yep, you're still fucked. both ways.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 27, 2007 11:08 pm Executor wrote: Uh, that would be because people dont know when to stop? Or know their limits.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 28, 2007 2:50 am More Misato, less war-stories.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon May 28, 2007 3:28 am Kyle wrote: Alcoholic mayby,slut no...we know she sleeps with Kaji and thats about it. There's really nothing in the series that lables her as a slut .

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Mon May 28, 2007 3:38 am Keep it down for the minors.... :roll: Personally I would not hook up with any of the EVA characters...This was on some other thread already...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 28, 2007 4:14 am Kyle wrote: Alcoholic mayby,slut no...we know she sleeps with Kaji and thats about it.There's really nothing in the series that lables her as a slut.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Mon May 28, 2007 8:12 am Operation Yashima wrote: Keep it down for the minors.... :roll:
